dashboard.label: MLTK Anomaly Hunting
dashboard.description: Cisco Time Series Model (CTSM) token forecasting and behavioral anomaly hunts. Requires Splunk MLTK + cisco-time-series-model app. Pair with Foundation-Sec-8B enrichment from the banking API.

ul.li: Splunk MLTK — Machine Learning Toolkit from Splunkbase
Cisco Time Series Model — splunk/cisco-time-series-model (installs ctsm_forecast algorithm)
Lab data — Workshop path Cisco + MLTK Anomaly Hunt or fire Scenarios 1, 6, 7, 9
Foundation-Sec-8B (optional) — fdtn-ai/Foundation-Sec-8B via Ollama; enrich hunts at POST /api/v1/hunt/foundation-sec

html.p: Cisco AI Defense scanners (AIBOM, MCP Scanner): github.com/cisco-ai-defense — enable with docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.cisco.yml

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ (mltk.ctsm_signal=true OR cisco_tsm_anomaly_score>0.8) | stats count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ cisco_tsm_anomaly_score=* | stats max(cisco_tsm_anomaly_score) as max_score | eval max_score=round(max_score,2)
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ (galileo_observe_alert=true OR galileo_anomaly_score>0.7) | stats count
`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ (cisco.aibom.status=FAIL OR cisco.mcp.status=FAIL OR cisco.mcp.status=WARN) | stats count

chart.title: Token usage — Cisco Time Series Model forecast (CTSM)

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval input_tokens=coalesce(gen_ai_input_tokens, gen_ai_usage_input_tokens, 0) | eval output_tokens=coalesce(gen_ai_output_tokens, gen_ai_usage_output_tokens, 0) | eval total_tokens=input_tokens+output_tokens | timechart span=1h sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens sum(input_tokens) AS input_tokens sum(output_tokens) AS output_tokens | fit MLTKContainer algo=ctsm_forecast total_tokens holdback=12 period=24 future_timespan=24 into forecast_total_tokens | eval anomaly_total=if(total_tokens > upper_total_tokens OR total_tokens < lower_total_tokens, total_tokens, null())

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ (mltk.ctsm_signal=true OR cisco_tsm_anomaly_score>0.8 OR call_depth_detected>5) | table _time incident_id campaign_week agent.id call_depth_detected gen_ai_input_tokens gen_ai_output_tokens tokens_consumed_in_loop cisco_tsm_anomaly_score api_cost_projected_usd technique_id | rename _time AS Time incident_id AS "Incident" campaign_week AS "Scenario" agent.id AS Agent call_depth_detected AS "Call Depth" gen_ai_input_tokens AS "Input Tokens" gen_ai_output_tokens AS "Output Tokens" tokens_consumed_in_loop AS "Loop Tokens" cisco_tsm_anomaly_score AS "TSM Score" api_cost_projected_usd AS "Est. Cost USD" technique_id AS Technique

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ (cisco_aibom_status=PROMPT_DRIFT_DETECTED OR cisco_aibom_status=HASH_MISMATCH OR galileo_observe_alert=true OR galileo_anomaly_score>0.7) | table _time incident_id campaign_week cisco_aibom_status agent.aibom_validated galileo_observe_alert galileo_anomaly_score technique_id framework.technique_name | rename _time AS Time incident_id AS Incident campaign_week AS Scenario cisco_aibom_status AS "AI-BOM Status" agent.aibom_validated AS "AIBOM Valid" galileo_observe_alert AS "Galileo Alert" galileo_anomaly_score AS "Galileo Score" technique_id AS Technique framework.technique_name AS "Technique Name"

p.strong: Scenario 7 — Infinity Bill / CTSM token surge

pre.code: `acme_genai_index` earliest=-1h campaign_week=7 | table _time call_depth_detected tokens_consumed_in_loop cisco_tsm_anomaly_score mltk.ctsm_signal
`acme_genai_index` earliest=-1h campaign_week=9 galileo_observe_alert=true | stats count by agent.id galileo_anomaly_score framework.technique_id
`acme_genai_index` earliest=-1h cisco_aibom_status!=MATCH | table _time agent.id cisco.aibom.scanner cisco.aibom.status model_artifact_hash_expected model_artifact_hash_found
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/v1/hunt/foundation-sec \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{"technique_id":"AML.T0057","context":"paste hunt row fields here"}'
